sourceStackPrimary: ADS-B Exchange globe_history direct historical trace fetch (named fallback activated after OpenSky access gate remained closed)
sourceStackSecondary: adsb.lol public CRJ900 candidate discovery plus stiles/flight-tracer URL pattern donor
samplingCadence: Irregular native trace cadence; median 4.36s, mean 5.58s, max 23.73s within the chosen window.
altitudeDatum: Barometric altitude in feet preserved as altitude_baro_ft; geometric altitude in feet preserved as altitude_geom_ft when present.
dataCompletenessNote: Selected subwindow has no internal gap above 60s; observed max gap is 23.73s.
fallbackTrigger: Default Stack A remained installed but historical OpenSky access was unavailable without credentials or browser auth, so the named fallback path was activated.
